[cron:19922548-2b4e-41ea-befb-46e73c073b21 ghl-l25-urgent-rollback-sentinel-30m] L2.5 ROLLBACK SENTINEL: Inspect last 24h messaging quality metrics in GHL (opt-out rate, complaint/reply-negative signals, deliverability errors, duplicate-send rate). Return blank when all thresholds are within bounds. If any threshold is exceeded (opt-out >2.5%, complaint >0.8%, duplicate-send >0.5%, hard-fail >5%), return only URGENT with the exact metric breaches and the rollback instruction to disable outbound-enabled jobs (ghl-control-loop-orchestrator-60m, ghl-funnel-qualification-60m, cart-recovery-process). Do not add analysis.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:25 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:25 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
